1.description: Contagion and distribution of  Wt+1⁠. This figure illustrates how changes in p affect the distribution of Wt+1 within a simplified version of the baseline model. The left panel depicts an economy with five firms connected along a star network. The right panel depicts estimates of the density function of nWt+1 when p∈{0.1,0.5,0.9}⁠.

2.description: Benchmark Gn This figure illustrates the network of the benchmark economy.
